subcodes.first_line: O friends, O true ones! Consider the glorious favors of the Lord, how like the moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ای راستان الطاف جلیله حضرت یزدانرا ملاحظه نمااید که چگونه مانند مه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @empty learning; false spirituality, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
